generated_oml:
prefix DTDFVocab: http://example.org/DTDFVocab#
prefix base: http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "LiDAR sensor for environmental mapping with 10m range and 270-degree field of view"
]
instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Depth camera providing RGB-D data for visual and depth information collection"
]
instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electronic speed controller converting desired speed into motor voltage commands"
]
instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering mechanism for vehicle direction control"
]
instance HokuyoPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]
instance D435iDepthDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]
instance HokuyoPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for environmental mapping",
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoPointCloudDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Python38, Cpp
]
instance D435iDepthData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth and visual data from Intel Deepsense D435i camera",
    DTDFVocab:fromData D435iDepthDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Python38, Cpp, MATLABSimulink
]
instance RealTimeVehicleStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state data including speed, position, and sensor readings"
]
instance ProjectedDrivingPath : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projected path of the vehicle based on current trajectory and sensor data"
]
instance DetectedObjectTracks : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Tracks of detected objects in the environment from LiDAR and camera data"
]
instance DataSavingCapability : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Capability to save real-time data for later analysis",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance ReportGeneration : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic generation of system operation reports",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance LeadVehicleDetection : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of lead vehicle in the path for adaptive cruise control"
]
instance SpeedComputation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Computation of optimal speed based on distance to lead vehicle"
]
instance ActuationCommandsOffloading : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Offloading of actuation command generation to cloud infrastructure",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance RemoteACCEnableDisable : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote enabling or disabling of Adaptive Cruise Control system",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance SetDesiredSpeed : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Setting the desired speed for the ACC system via remote interface",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance EmergencyBrakingCommand : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Issuing emergency braking command remotely to the vehicle",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state data, projected driving path, detected object tracks, and data saving/report generation capabilities",
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVehicleStateVisualization, ProjectedDrivingPath, DetectedObjectTracks, DataSavingCapability, ReportGeneration
]
instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloading of ACC system's lead vehicle detection, speed computation based on distance, and actuation commands from vehicle ECU to cloud",
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetection, SpeedComputation, ActuationCommandsOffloading
]
instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote enable/disable of ACC, setting desired speed, and issuing emergency braking commands via user interface",
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteACCEnableDisable, SetDesiredSpeed, EmergencyBrakingCommand
]
instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK development environment for embedded systems",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]
instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 middleware for inter-component communication",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]
instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 implementation for data processing and control logic",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]
instance Cpp : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ implementation for performance-critical components",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]
instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for simulation and control logic development",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]
instance ThreeDVisualization : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D Visualization component for real-time data display"
]
instance ControlPanel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Control Panel for remote command input"
]
instance UserInterfaceFE : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "User Interface Functional Entity",
    base:contains ThreeDVisualization, ControlPanel
]
instance DataCollectingFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Data Collecting Functional Entity for sensor data collection"
]
instance PointCloudClusteringComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking software component for sensor data processing"
]
instance DataTranslationComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Data Translation component for serialization, message type alignment, and unit conversions"
]
instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity hosting physical sensors and actuators",
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera, VedderElectronicSpeedController, SteeringServo, DataCollectingFE, PointCloudClusteringComponent, DataTranslationComponent
]
instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity for data processing and simulation",
    base:contains DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, NVIDIAJetpack50SDK, ROS2Middleware, Python38, Cpp, MATLABSimulink
]
instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "User Entity for remote interaction",
    base:contains UserInterfaceFE
]
instance ACCVehicleSystem : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "1/10-scale teleoperated autonomous vehicle for ACC domain testing",
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands including enabling/disabling ACC, modifying desired speed, and emergency braking are processed by the Controlling FE. These commands are serialized and converted via the Data Translation component before being transmitted over Wi-Fi network to the Actuation FE, which converts desired speed into motor voltage commands for physical actuation. Feedback from actuation is monitored through the Data Monitoring service."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The system requires 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for computation offloading between devices in safety-critical vehicular applications, as mandated by industry standards but constrained by hardware limitations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The architecture follows ISO 23247 RA, with software components mapped to Functional Entities (FEs) implemented as ROS2 packages. Each FE is deployed as individual ROS2 nodes across three hardware-based entities (Physical Twin, Digital Twin, User), enabling system-wide coordination through ROS2 communication. The Physical Twin Entity's design deviates from ISO 23247 by including general automotive functionality like Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking, while the User Entity's interface is split into visualization and control panel components."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between software components occurs within a ROS2 network. Inter-entity communication is conducted over a Wi-Fi network using UDP in the transport layer. The architecture supports real-time data transfer with ROS2 for intra-component communication and UDP-based Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 23247:2021, which includes four parts covering overview, reference architecture (Part 2), digital representation of physical elements (Part 3), and information exchange (Part 4). The reference architecture defines an entity-based structure with Observable Manufacturing Elements (OMEs), Data Collection and Device Control Entities, Digital Twin Entities, and User Entities. Functional Entities (FEs) within these entities handle tasks like actuation, data transformation into human-interpretable formats, and user interfacing. OPC Unified Architecture (OPC UA) is referenced as an example protocol for data collection and device control."
]
